evals.prompt: Build a responsive analytics dashboard with 3 bento cards. Maya spacing, subtle hover scale, tactile click state.
evals.expected_output: Cards, grid layout, spacing, elevation, hover/active states

evals.prompt: Create a Deploy button. On click: audio, tactile depress, icon swaps from rocket to checkmark with bouncy animation.
evals.expected_output: Icon swap mechanics, spring-bounce, audio, active state

evals.prompt: Implement a dark/light mode toggle with cinematic circular reveal from the click point.
evals.expected_output: Theme toggle, View Transition API, Pythagorean math

evals.prompt: Build a contact form (name, email, message). Show floating labels, inline errors on submit, success toast.
evals.expected_output: Inputs, form layout, validation state, concave depth, toast

evals.prompt: Create a modal with focus trap, Escape to close, scroll-lock, backdrop dismiss. Include ARIA attributes.
Build a global toast system. Multiple types (success/error/warning). Auto-dismiss. Stack max 3.
Build a sortable data table. Sortable columns with arrow indicator, zebra rows, hover state. Tabular numbers.
Build a card that shows a skeleton shimmer for 2s then transitions to real content.
Build a sticky glassmorphism topbar with nav links, a CTA button, and a hamburger for mobile.
Build an empty state for a task list. Icon, headline, body, CTA. Dashed border container.
